FeaturesPage.metaDescription: Explore Planificator's production scheduling features: AI optimization, Gantt visualization, resource management, shift planning, BOM, and shop floor tracking.

hero.title: Powerful Tools for Modern Manufacturing
hero.subtitle: From AI-powered scheduling to real-time shop floor tracking, Planificator gives your team complete control over production planning.

scheduling.title: Production Scheduling
scheduling.description: Visualize, plan, and optimize your entire production timeline with an intelligent Gantt chart interface.

0.title: Interactive Gantt Chart
0.description: See every order, resource, and operation on a dynamic timeline. Drag and drop to reschedule, zoom in on bottlenecks, and get the big picture at a glance.

1.title: Drag-and-Drop Scheduling
1.description: Move operations between resources and time slots with intuitive drag-and-drop. Conflicts are detected automatically before you commit changes.

2.title: Real-Time Conflict Detection
2.description: Instantly see scheduling conflicts, resource overloads, and constraint violations. Planificator highlights problems before they reach the shop floor.

3.title: Multi-Resource View
3.description: View all machines, workers, and workstations on a single timeline. Filter by resource group, shift, or department to focus on what matters.

resources.title: Resource Management
resources.description: Track every machine, worker, and station. Know what is available, what is running, and what needs attention.

0.title: Machine & Equipment Tracking
0.description: Register all production resources with detailed specifications -- capacity, capabilities, setup requirements, and maintenance windows.

1.title: Worker & Skill Management
1.description: Assign workers based on skills, certifications, and availability. Ensure the right person is at the right machine at the right time.

2.title: Capacity Planning
2.description: See available capacity across all resources at a glance. Identify bottlenecks before they cause delays and plan for peak demand.

3.title: Resource Groups
3.description: Organize resources into logical groups -- production lines, departments, or skill pools. Schedule at the group level or drill down to individual resources.

optimization.title: AI Optimization
optimization.description: Let artificial intelligence find the best production schedule. Configure your goals and let the optimizer do the heavy lifting.

0.title: AI Scheduling Engine
0.description: Our optimization engine evaluates thousands of possible schedules to find the one that best meets your objectives -- automatically.

1.title: Configurable Objectives
1.description: Minimize late orders, reduce changeover time, balance workload, or optimize for throughput. Set priorities and let the AI decide the best trade-offs.

2.title: Constraint Handling
2.description: Define hard constraints (resource availability, order deadlines) and soft constraints (preferred sequences, load balancing). The optimizer respects them all.

3.title: What-If Scenarios
3.description: Run multiple optimization scenarios to compare outcomes. See how adding a shift, changing priorities, or accepting a rush order affects your entire schedule.

shifts.title: Shifts & Calendar
shifts.description: Define work patterns, manage breaks, and handle changeovers. Your schedule reflects how your factory actually operates.

0.title: Shift Templates
0.description: Create reusable shift patterns -- day shift, night shift, rotating schedules. Apply them to resources or entire departments with one click.

1.title: Break & Downtime Management
1.description: Schedule breaks, planned maintenance, and cleaning periods. The optimizer works around downtime automatically.

2.title: Changeover Time Matrices
2.description: Define setup times between product types or configurations. The optimizer sequences jobs to minimize total changeover time.

3.title: Holiday & Exception Calendars
3.description: Mark public holidays, factory shutdowns, and special events. The schedule adjusts automatically -- no manual corrections needed.

bom.title: BOM & Inventory
bom.description: Manage bills of materials, track stock levels, and ensure materials are available when production needs them.

0.title: Bill of Materials
0.description: Define multi-level BOMs with components, sub-assemblies, and raw materials. Link BOMs directly to production orders for full traceability.

1.title: Inventory Tracking
1.description: Monitor stock levels in real time. Get alerts when inventory drops below safety stock and see which orders are at risk of material shortages.

2.title: Material Availability Check
2.description: Before scheduling an order, verify that all required materials are in stock or on order. Prevent scheduling orders that cannot be produced.

shopFloor.title: Shop Floor Tracking
shopFloor.description: See what is happening on the production floor right now. Track progress, collect feedback, and close the loop between planning and execution.

0.title: Real-Time Production Status
0.description: See which operations are in progress, completed, or delayed. Live updates from the shop floor feed directly into your scheduling view.

1.title: Order Progress Tracking
1.description: Track each order from release to completion. Know exactly where every job stands and when it will be finished.

2.title: Operator Feedback
2.description: Let operators report progress, flag issues, and log actual times from the production floor. Close the gap between the plan and reality.

UseCasesIndex.metaDescription: See how manufacturers use Planificator for discrete manufacturing, job shop scheduling, and production planning optimization.
UseCasesIndex.title: Built for How You Work
UseCasesIndex.subtitle: Whether you run a high-volume production line or a custom job shop, Planificator adapts to your workflow.

discrete-manufacturing.title: Discrete Manufacturing
discrete-manufacturing.description: High-volume production lines with complex sequencing, multi-resource coordination, and tight delivery windows.

job-shops.title: Job Shops
job-shops.description: High-mix, low-volume environments where every order is different and priorities shift constantly.

production-planning.title: Production Planning
production-planning.description: Strategic scheduling across resources, shifts, and order priorities -- replacing spreadsheets with AI.

PricingPage.metaDescription: Explore Planificator pricing tiers for production scheduling. From small manufacturers to enterprise operations -- find the right plan for your factory.

hero.title: Simple Plans for Every Factory
hero.subtitle: From small workshops to large-scale operations. Choose the plan that matches your production needs.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For small manufacturers getting started with intelligent scheduling.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: For growing manufacturers who need full optimization and multi-resource planning.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large operations with complex requirements and custom integration needs.

0.question: Is there a free trial?
0.answer: Yes. We offer a guided demo and trial period so you can see Planificator with your own data before committing. Contact us to get started.

1.question: Can I upgrade my plan later?
1.answer: Absolutely. You can upgrade at any time as your needs grow. Your data and configuration carry over seamlessly.

2.question: Do you offer discounts for annual billing?
2.answer: Yes, we offer significant savings for annual commitments. Contact our sales team for detailed pricing.

3.question: How long does implementation take?
3.answer: Most teams are up and running within 1-2 weeks. Enterprise deployments with custom integrations may take 4-6 weeks. We support you through every step.

4.question: Can Planificator integrate with our ERP system?
4.answer: The Enterprise plan includes API access for custom integrations with ERP systems, MES platforms, and other business software. Contact us for integration details.

5.question: Is our data secure?
5.answer: Yes. Planificator uses industry-standard encryption, secure cloud infrastructure, and regular security audits. Your production data is private and protected.

discrete-manufacturing.metaDescription: See how Planificator helps discrete manufacturers optimize production scheduling, reduce changeover time, and deliver on time.

hero.title: Scheduling for Discrete Manufacturing
hero.subtitle: Coordinate complex production sequences across multiple machines and shifts. Planificator keeps your lines running efficiently and your deliveries on time.

0.title: Complex Sequencing
0.description: Hundreds of orders competing for shared resources. Manual scheduling means constant firefighting and missed deadlines.

1.title: Changeover Waste
1.description: Frequent product changes on the same machine. Without optimization, changeover time eats into productive hours.

2.title: No Cross-Machine Visibility
2.description: Each department schedules independently. Downstream delays are invisible until they cause a crisis.

3.title: Excel Does Not Scale
3.description: Spreadsheet-based scheduling breaks down as order volume grows. One change ripples through the entire plan.

0.title: AI-Optimized Sequences
0.description: The optimizer evaluates thousands of possible sequences to minimize late orders and maximize throughput across all resources.

1.title: Changeover Minimization
1.description: Define changeover matrices and let the AI group similar jobs together, reducing setup time by up to 40%.

2.title: End-to-End Gantt View
2.description: See every machine, every order, and every dependency on a single timeline. Spot bottlenecks before they cause delays.

3.title: Instant Replanning
3.description: When a machine breaks down or a rush order arrives, reschedule in minutes -- not hours. The optimizer handles the cascade automatically.

testimonial.quote: We went from spending a full day on the weekly schedule to having an optimized plan in under an hour. The AI handles complexity we could never manage in Excel.
testimonial.name: Dimitar Ivanov
testimonial.title: Production Director

job-shops.metaDescription: See how Planificator helps job shops manage high-mix, low-volume scheduling with AI optimization and real-time replanning.

hero.title: Scheduling for Job Shops
hero.subtitle: Every order is different. Every deadline matters. Planificator gives job shops the agility to handle constant change without chaos.

0.title: Every Order Is Unique
0.description: No two jobs are the same. Routing, processing times, and resource requirements vary for every order.

1.title: Constant Reprioritization
1.description: Rush orders arrive daily. Each one reshuffles the entire schedule, and manual adjustments take hours.

2.title: Resource Juggling
2.description: Skilled workers, specialized machines, and limited tooling create complex constraints that spreadsheets cannot handle.

3.title: Quoting Accuracy
3.description: Without visibility into current load, delivery date promises are guesses. Over-promise and lose trust, under-promise and lose the job.

0.title: Flexible Order Routing
0.description: Define alternative routings and let the optimizer choose the best path based on current load and availability.

1.title: One-Click Reschedule
1.description: Insert a rush order and see the cascade instantly. The AI finds the least-disruptive insertion point automatically.

2.title: Skill-Based Assignment
2.description: Match workers to jobs based on skills, certifications, and current availability. The optimizer respects all constraints.

3.title: Realistic Delivery Dates
3.description: See actual available capacity before quoting. Give customers accurate lead times based on your real schedule, not guesses.

testimonial.quote: In a job shop, everything changes by the hour. Planificator lets us react in minutes instead of spending all afternoon on the whiteboard.
testimonial.name: Nikolay Todorov
testimonial.title: Shop Floor Manager

production-planning.metaDescription: Replace spreadsheet scheduling with AI-powered production planning. Planificator helps planners optimize across resources, shifts, and priorities.

hero.title: Smarter Production Planning
hero.subtitle: Stop spending hours building schedules manually. Planificator gives production planners the tools to create optimized plans in minutes, not days.

0.title: Time-Consuming Manual Planning
0.description: Building a weekly schedule takes hours or days. By the time it is done, something has already changed.

1.title: No What-If Analysis
1.description: You cannot easily compare scenarios. What if we add a shift? What if we prioritize this customer? Each scenario means rebuilding the plan.

2.title: Reactive, Not Proactive
2.description: Without forecasting tools, planning is always catching up to reality rather than getting ahead of it.

3.title: Scattered Information
3.description: Order data in ERP, resource info in spreadsheets, shift plans on the wall. No single source of truth for the planner.

0.title: AI-Generated Schedules
0.description: Define your constraints and objectives. The optimizer generates a complete schedule in minutes, considering all resources and dependencies.

1.title: Scenario Comparison
1.description: Run multiple what-if scenarios side by side. Compare the impact of adding resources, changing priorities, or accepting new orders.

2.title: Proactive Planning
2.description: See capacity bottlenecks weeks ahead. Plan preventive maintenance, overtime, or outsourcing before problems materialize.

3.title: Single Source of Truth
3.description: All orders, resources, shifts, and constraints in one platform. Everyone works from the same up-to-date schedule.

testimonial.quote: We used to spend two days building the weekly plan. Now I run the optimizer and have a better schedule in 30 minutes. I actually have time for proactive planning.
testimonial.name: Elena Marinova
testimonial.title: Senior Production Planner

AboutPage.metaDescription: Learn about Planificator -- where practical manufacturing experience meets artificial intelligence for production scheduling.

hero.title: A Revolution in Production Planning
hero.subtitle: Where Experience Meets Artificial Intelligence -- in the dynamic world of Industry 4.0, production scheduling demands more than spreadsheets and intuition.

paragraphs.0: Planificator is the distillation of years of hands-on experience in production environments. We have walked the production halls, spoken with planners, operators, and managers, and we understand the real chaos that happens between a customer order and a finished product.
paragraphs.1: We know what it means to reschedule an entire week because one machine broke down on Monday morning. We know the frustration of a planner staring at a spreadsheet, trying to fit 200 orders across 30 machines with shifting priorities.
paragraphs.2: That experience is coded into every algorithm and every screen of Planificator. This is not software built in an ivory tower -- it is built by people who understand the shop floor.

technology.title: Technology That Makes the Difference
technology.subtitle: Modern AI and mathematical optimization, purpose-built for production scheduling.

0.title: APS and AI Optimization
0.description: We combine advanced planning and scheduling with modern AI and mathematical optimization. The result: optimal resource utilization, minimized rework, and maximized on-time delivery.

1.title: Next-Generation Intelligence
1.description: Planificator is adaptive -- it learns from history, suggests alternatives when constraints tighten, and automates routine scheduling decisions so your planners can focus on exceptions.

2.title: World-Class Technology
2.description: Fast, scalable, and easy to integrate. Planificator is built to rival global leaders in production scheduling while remaining accessible to manufacturers of every size.

AboutPage.missionStatement: To turn complex planning into a competitive advantage for every manufacturer by bringing together human expertise and the power of algorithms.

ROICalculator.metaDescription: Calculate how much time and money Planificator could save your production planning team. Enter your details and see estimated savings.

hero.title: How Much Time Could You Save?
hero.subtitle: Enter your production details below and see how AI-powered scheduling could transform your planning process.

inputs.ordersPerWeekHelp: Average number of production orders you schedule each week
inputs.schedulingHoursHelp: Hours your team currently spends on production scheduling per week
inputs.resourcesHelp: Total machines, workers, or workstations you schedule across
inputs.currentMethodHelp: How do you currently create your production schedule?

results.title: Your Estimated Savings
results.disclaimer: Estimates based on industry benchmarks. Actual results vary based on your specific environment.

methodology.title: How We Calculated This
methodology.description: Our estimates are based on observed efficiency gains across manufacturing environments of similar size and complexity.
methodology.conservative: We use conservative estimates and show ranges rather than exact numbers. The lower bound represents a cautious projection; the upper bound represents typical best-case outcomes.
methodology.factors: Factors considered: your current scheduling method, number of production resources, and weekly order volume. Cost savings assume an average production planner rate of EUR 35/hour.

cta.title: Want to Validate These Numbers?
cta.description: Book a free demo and we'll run the analysis with your real production data -- no commitment required.

CookieConsent.message: We use cookies for the demo booking widget on our contact page. Our analytics (Plausible) are completely cookieless.
